feature: Enforce workplan evidence at authoring time
description: Close the reconcile false-positive class at the authoring layer: make task.files[] a REQUIRED, non-empty field in the workplan schema, refuse to load workplans that violate it, emit clear errors pointing at the offending task, and retrofit every in-flight workplan (starting with wp-rename-brain-to-sched.json and wp-hex-native-web-search.json) so existing reconcile runs stop falsely promoting prose-only done-conditions. Surfaced by: ADR-2604150000 clap wiring reconciled as 11/11 done while `hex sched` command did not exist (commit 75268e70 had to be hand-wired). Complements ADR-2604142200 (runtime verifier) by preventing the broken input shape from ever reaching the verifier.
notes: Per feedback_workplan_wrap_fixes: this workplan is itself a T3 fix being routed through the proper pipeline instead of ad-hoc commits. Each task below has files[] populated and commit-id convention (E1.1, E1.2, ...) so reconcile can verify this workplan's own execution.

phases.name: Schema validator — reject workplans with missing evidence
phases.description: Add a loader-time validator that rejects workplans where any task has empty/missing files[]. Error message must point at the task id and suggest adding the output files. Validator runs in both `hex plan execute` (refuse to dispatch) and `hex plan reconcile` (refuse to verify). Same function used in both paths.

tasks.name: Validator pure function
tasks.description: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/schema_validate.rs: pub fn validate_workplan_evidence(wp: &Workplan) -> Result<(), Vec<EvidenceViolation>>. Struct EvidenceViolation { task_id: String, kind: MissingFiles | EmptyFiles | NonExistentPath | ProseOnlyDescription, detail: String }. Empty files[] → EmptyFiles. Description with no declared symbol or file path → ProseOnlyDescription.

tasks.name: Wire validator into plan execute + reconcile
tasks.description: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/execute.rs and reconcile.rs: call validate_workplan_evidence before any dispatch or promotion. On Err(violations), print each violation with task_id and bail with exit code 2. Add --accept-incomplete-evidence flag that downgrades to a warning (for explicit author intent).

tasks.name: Unit tests — schema rejection fixtures
tasks.description: hex-cli/tests/workplan_schema.rs: fixtures for each EvidenceViolation kind. Assert validator Err() with correct task_id + kind. Separate passing fixture with fully-populated files[] to prove no false-negative.

phases.name: Retrofit in-flight workplans
phases.description: Run the new validator against every docs/workplans/wp-*.json. Fix offenders by populating files[] with the actual paths the task touches — derived from git log + manual audit where commits are already landed. Priority: wp-rename-brain-to-sched.json (had 11/11 false-positive), then wp-hex-native-web-search.json (P2+ blocked on same bug), then the rest.

tasks.name: Retrofit wp-rename-brain-to-sched.json
tasks.description: Populate files[] for each of the 11 steps pointing at the actual renamed artifacts: hex-cli/src/commands/sched.rs, hex-cli/src/commands/brain_alias.rs, hex-cli/src/main.rs, hex-nexus/src/routes/sched.rs (if present), scripts/hex-statusline.cjs, docs/adrs/ADR-2604150000-rename-brain-to-sched.md. Re-reconcile and confirm all 11 verify against real evidence (including the new commit 75268e70 that wired the clap variants).

tasks.name: Retrofit wp-hex-native-web-search.json
tasks.description: Blocked by E2.1 pattern. Populate files[] for every P2+ task. Reconcile should revert any previously-false 'done' to 'pending' for steps where files[] was empty.

tasks.name: Retrofit remaining wp-*.json files
tasks.description: For every wp-*.json in docs/workplans/ (excluding already-done P0-historical), run validator, populate missing files[]. Commit per-workplan with message scope `wp(<feature>): retrofit evidence`.

phases.name: Author-time tooling — `hex plan lint`
phases.description: New CLI: `hex plan lint <path|--all>` runs validate_workplan_evidence against one or all workplans and prints a table (task_id | violation | suggested_fix). Zero exit code = clean. Intended for pre-commit hook and CI.

tasks.name: plan lint subcommand
tasks.description: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/lint.rs: pub async fn run(path: Option<PathBuf>, all: bool) -> anyhow::Result<()>. Reuses validate_workplan_evidence. Wire into main.rs under Commands::Plan subcommand tree.

tasks.name: Pre-commit hook asset — workplan-evidence-lint.yml
tasks.description: hex-cli/assets/hooks/hex/workplan-evidence-lint.yml: PreToolUse hook on Edit/Write of docs/workplans/wp-*.json runs `hex plan lint <file>` and blocks commits with violations. Installed into target .claude/settings.json by `hex init`.

phases.name: Rebuild + ADR status
phases.description: Rebuild hex-cli release, install to PATH, run `hex plan lint --all` clean, flip ADR-2604142200 Status line from whatever current → Accepted with a retrospective note pointing at this workplan.

gate.command: hex plan lint --all && hex plan reconcile --all --audit

tasks.name: Release build + self-verify
tasks.description: cargo build -p hex-cli --release. hex plan lint --all reports zero violations. hex plan reconcile --all --audit reports zero false-positive reverts (all previously-"done" tasks either stay done with evidence OR flip to pending with logged reason).

tasks.name: ADR status flip + retrospective
tasks.description: docs/adrs/ADR-2604142200-reconcile-evidence-verification.md: Status → Accepted. Add a `## Retrospective` section linking wp-enforce-workplan-evidence.json and noting the two real-world failures it closed (wp-rename-brain-to-sched 11/11 false-positive, wp-hex-native-web-search P2+ blocked).
